messages.content: 中译英：中国区执行副总裁兼华南业务主管
Vice President and Chief Operating Officer for China Region and Southern China Business Supervisor
中译英：Jayson在我们公司共有2段实习经历，分别是2022.2-2022.6以及2023年暑假，加起来大约半年的时间。在去年的第一段实习中，他的Office在深圳，我主管华南区域，经常会来深圳出差，因此逐渐和Jayson认识。在今年的第二段实习中，Jayson还同时参与了广州的实习生培训，我作为主讲讲师再一次和他见面，并且私下询问了他的升学以及工作情况，所以对他有了进一步的了解。

Jayson had two internship experiences in our company. The first one was from February 2022 to June 2022, and the second one was during the summer of 2023, totaling approximately six months. During the first internship period, his office was in Shenzhen, and I was the supervisor for the Southern China region. I frequently traveled to Shenzhen for business, which allowed me to gradually get to know Jayson. In the second internship period this year, Jayson also participated in the internship training in Guangzhou. As the lecturer for the training, I had the opportunity to meet him again and privately inquire about his further studies and job placement, which allowed me to gain further understanding about him.

润色如下内容：This letter is intended to serve as a postgraduate study recommendation for Mr. Jayson Dongwei ZHANG. Jayson had two internship experiences in our company. The first one was from February 2022 to June 2022, and the second one was during the summer of 2023, totaling approximately six months. During the first internship period, his office was in Shenzhen, and I was the supervisor for the Southern China region. I frequently traveled to Shenzhen for business, which allowed me to gradually get to know Jayson. In the second internship period this year, Jayson also participated in the internship training in Guangzhou. As the lecturer for the training, I had the opportunity to meet him again and privately inquire about his further studies and job placement, which allowed me to gain a further understanding of him. As his supervisor, I thus have a good chance to observe his performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of his potential.

This letter serves as a recommendation for Mr. Jayson Dongwei ZHANG's postgraduate study. Jayson undertook two internship experiences in our company. The first internship lasted from February 2022 to June 2022, and the second one took place during the summer of 2023, totaling approximately six months. During his first internship, Jayson was based in Shenzhen, while I served as the supervisor for the Southern China region. Due to my frequent business trips to Shenzhen, I had the opportunity to get to know Jayson progressively. In his second internship this year, Jayson also participated in the internship training held in Guangzhou. As the training lecturer, I had the chance to meet him once again and privately discuss his further studies and job prospects, which enabled me to gain a deeper understanding of his capabilities. As his supervisor, I have closely observed Jayson's performance and am confident in providing an evaluation of his potential.

中译英：在实习期间，Jayson主要在China go global部门，负责了品牌Miniso和EcoFlow的出海工作。其中在付费媒体paid media和免费触达媒体 free pitch都进行了长时间的工作。他还独立沟通了EcoFlow关于paid media在amazon prime day 的营销宣传活动。今年Jayson还参与了Wilson的方案比稿，以及正在接手关于Fila和中网大师赛的合作campaign。

During his internship, Jayson primarily worked in the China Go Global department, where he was responsible for the overseas expansion of brands such as Miniso and EcoFlow. He dedicated a significant amount of time to working on paid media and free pitch outreach strategies. Additionally, he independently communicated with EcoFlow regarding the marketing and promotional activities for paid media on Amazon Prime Day. This year, Jayson also participated in Wilson's proposal pitch and is currently taking on a cooperative campaign for Fila and the China Open.

润色如下内容：During his internship, Jayson primarily worked in the China Go Global department, where he was responsible for the overseas expansion of brands such as Miniso and EcoFlow. He dedicated a significant amount of time to working on paid media and free pitch outreach strategies. Additionally, he independently communicated with EcoFlow regarding the marketing and promotional activities for paid media on Amazon Prime Day. This year, Jayson also participated in Wilson’s proposal pitch and is currently taking on a cooperative campaign for Fila and the China Open.

During his internship, Jayson played a key role in the China Go Global department, spearheading the overseas expansion efforts for renowned brands like Miniso and EcoFlow. His primary responsibilities entailed developing and executing strategies to effectively penetrate international markets. Jayson displayed exceptional dedication towards optimizing paid media campaigns and implementing successful free pitch outreach initiatives. Notably, he independently handled the communication with EcoFlow, orchestrating impactful marketing and promotional activities specifically for paid media during the Amazon Prime Day. Furthermore, this year, Jayson actively contributed to Wilson's proposal pitch and has now assumed the responsibility of managing a collaborative campaign for Fila in conjunction with the prestigious China Open tournament.

中译英：在第一次实习期间，Jayson高效的工作效率、强大的沟通能力和对工作细节的把控能力都给我留下了深刻的印象。还记得当时他所负责的主要客户是EcoFlow和obsbot，而Jayson的工作主要是建立媒体库以及联系媒体。在四个月的期间，他收录了超过300家科技类和综合类的海外媒体。不仅如此，他还先后进行了4-5轮的媒体联系，这些联系主要是以免费出稿的形式为主，即通过公司声誉和高质量的pitch letter让记者留下印象，进行出稿，最终完成10篇左右的出稿落地。同时在后期，Jayson还接手了付费媒体的联系，即通过购买不同新闻媒体公司的package来起到出稿的作用。在我的指导下，他一共联系了5家媒体并且进行深度沟通，包括确定了篇幅长度，推广位置，网页广告位以及社交媒体宣传等细节。并且在沟通过程中，他多次参与视频会议跟海外记者进行交流，确定发布细节。最终在amazon prime day时成功推出文章。这可以看出他认真负责的工作态度。

During his first internship, Jayson left a deep impression on me with his high work efficiency, strong communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail. I distinctly remember that he was primarily responsible for managing clients such as EcoFlow and obsbot, with his main tasks focusing on building a media database and establishing media connections.

Over the course of four months, Jayson successfully compiled information on over 300 overseas tech and general media outlets. Not only that, but he also conducted 4-5 rounds of media outreach, primarily through free pitch submissions. Using the company's reputation and high-quality pitch letters, Jayson left a lasting impression on journalists, resulting in the publication of approximately 10 articles. Furthermore, in the later stages, he took on the responsibility of handling paid media contacts, utilizing purchased packages from various news media companies for article placements.

Under my guidance, Jayson made contact with five media outlets and engaged in in-depth communication. This involved determining article length, promotional placements, website ad positioning, and social media promotion details. During the communication process, Jayson actively participated in video conferences with overseas reporters, finalizing publication details. As a result, articles were successfully launched during the Amazon Prime Day event, showcasing Jayson's diligent and responsible work attitude.

润色如下内容：During his first internship, Jayson left a deep impression on me with his high work efficiency, strong communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail. I distinctly remember that he was primarily responsible for managing clients such as EcoFlow and obsbot, with his main tasks focusing on building a media database and establishing media connections.

Over the course of four months, Jayson successfully compiled information on over 300 overseas tech and general media outlets. Not only that, but he also conducted 4-5 rounds of media outreach, primarily through free pitch submissions. Using the company’s reputation and high-quality pitch letters, Jayson left a lasting impression on journalists, resulting in the publication of approximately 10 articles. Furthermore, in the later stages, he took on the responsibility of handling paid media contacts, utilizing purchased packages from various news media companies for article placements.

Under my guidance, Jayson made contact with five media outlets and engaged in in-depth communication. This involved determining article length, promotional placements, website ad positioning, and social media promotion details. During the communication process, Jayson actively participated in video conferences with overseas reporters, finalizing publication details. As a result, articles were successfully launched during the Amazon Prime Day event, showcasing Jayson’s diligent and responsible work attitude.

During Jayson's first internship, I was deeply impressed by his exceptional work efficiency, strong communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail. He was assigned major clients like EcoFlow and obsbot, and his primary focus was on developing a comprehensive media database and establishing fruitful media relationships.

Over a period of four months, Jayson meticulously compiled information on more than 300 overseas tech and general media outlets. He conducted 4-5 rounds of media outreach, predominantly through well-crafted free pitch submissions. Utilizing the company's reputation and his excellent pitch letters, Jayson left a lasting impression on journalists, resulting in the publication of approximately 10 articles. As the internship progressed, Jayson also took on the responsibility of managing paid media contacts by procuring packages from multiple news media companies for article placements.

Under my guidance, Jayson successfully established contact with five media outlets and conducted in-depth communications with them. This involved negotiating article length, optimizing promotional placements, determining website ad positioning, and planning social media promotions. During the communication process, Jayson actively engaged in video conferences with overseas reporters to finalize publication details. As a result of his diligent and responsible work attitude, the articles were successfully launched during the Amazon Prime Day event, showcasing Jayson's exceptional performance.
润色如下内容：Over a period of four months, Jayson meticulously compiled information on more than 300 overseas tech and general media outlets, while few of his peer interns could do so.

During a span of four months, Jayson demonstrated an exceptional level of dedication and meticulousness in compiling information on over 300 overseas tech and general media outlets. This accomplishment truly sets him apart from his fellow interns, as very few of them were able to achieve such a comprehensive task within the same timeframe.

中译英：在今年Jayson的第二段实习中，我和他在工作中了有着更多的业务交集。特别是，我们一同配合hk office的人对接东亚银行的香港客户，在前海东亚银行总部进行实地勘测，与客户沟通会在哪里进行包括采访以及发布会的布局，确定了地点细节。此外，在与Fila和北京中网的广告合作中，我非常欣赏Jayson首先提出了传播关键词以及传播主题为“一起挥拍，奔赴京彩”，我认为他具备出众的理念，同时具有传播领域的sense和天赋，假以时日，必成大器。

During Jayson's second internship this year, I had more business interactions with him. Specifically, we worked together in coordinating with the Hong Kong office to engage with clients of East Asia Bank, conducting on-site surveys at their headquarters in Qianhai. We communicated with the clients to determine the layout and details of interviews and press conferences, finalizing the venue arrangements.

Furthermore, in the advertising collaboration between Fila and the Beijing China Open, I greatly appreciated Jayson's initiative in suggesting key communication keywords and themes such as "Unleash the Passion on the Court Together." It showcased his outstanding conceptual thinking abilities and demonstrated his innate sense and talent in the field of communication. With time and experience, he is bound to achieve great success.

润色如下内容：During Jayson’s second internship this year, I had more business interactions with him. Specifically, we worked together in coordinating with the Hong Kong office to engage with clients of East Asia Bank, conducting on-site surveys at their headquarters in Qianhai. We communicated with the clients to determine the layout and details of interviews and press conferences, finalizing the venue arrangements.

Furthermore, in the advertising collaboration between Fila and the Beijing China Open, I greatly appreciated Jayson’s initiative in suggesting key communication keywords and themes such as “Unleash the Passion on the Court Together.” It showcased his outstanding conceptual thinking abilities and demonstrated his innate sense and talent in the field of communication. With time and experience, he is bound to achieve great success.

During Jayson's second internship this year, I had the opportunity to collaborate with him on various business projects. One significant project involved working together with the Hong Kong office to engage with clients from East Asia Bank. We conducted on-site surveys at their headquarters in Qianhai, communicating with the clients to determine the layout and details of interviews and press conferences. Through our efforts, we successfully finalized the venue arrangements.

Additionally, Jayson made valuable contributions to the advertising collaboration between Fila and the Beijing China Open. I was particularly impressed by his initiative in suggesting key communication keywords and themes, such as "Unleash the Passion on the Court Together." This demonstrated his exceptional conceptual thinking abilities and highlighted his innate sense and talent in the field of communication. With further time and experience, I have no doubt that Jayson will achieve great success in his career.
润色如下内容：It is also worthwhile to note Jayson's creativity as a media or communications professional.
Furthermore, it is worth noting Jayson's exceptional creativity as a media and communications professional.

润色如下内容：Owing to the above performance, I firmly believe that Jayson is a promising student, and strongly recommend him to you. I think he will be a great addition to your graduate program and you will not be disappointed by his efforts to excel and fit into your university. If you have any questions at all about Mr. Jayson ZHANG, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.

Based on the aforementioned performance, I wholeheartedly believe that Jayson is a highly promising student and I strongly recommend him to your distinguished graduate program. I am confident that he will make a valuable contribution to your university and exceed your expectations with his determination to excel and adapt. If you have any further inquiries regarding Mr. Jayson ZHANG, please do not hesitate to contact me directly.
